name: themekit
summary: A token-driven, brand-neutral SwiftUI design system. Every color / radius / spacing / type style is a token resolved at runtime from the active Theme; components never hardcode a color.
rules: Read the theme via `@Environment(\.theme) private var theme`; inject `.environment(Theme.shared)` once at the root.
Never hardcode a color — use `theme.text(.textPrimary)`, `theme.background(.bgWhite)`, or a `SemanticColor`.
Put required content/bindings/actions in `init`; set variants, sizes, flags, colors and callbacks with chainable modifiers.
Sizes use `.controlSize(_:)`; disabled state uses `.disabled(_:)`; accessibility id uses `.a11yID(_:)`.
Recolor everything with `Theme.shared.applyGenerated(primaryHex:)` or a theme preset: `ThemePreset.named("dracula")?.apply()`.

components.name: AnimatedImage
components.doc: Animated GIF / APNG playback with NO third-party dependency — frames and per-frame delays are decoded natively via ImageIO (`CGImageSource`) and driven by a `TimelineView(.animation)`.

modifiers.name: badgeColor

components.name: Chip
components.doc: Improved, token-bound rewrite of the reference BasicChip — a single clear selection API (tonal / solid) instead of the reference's nested status × mode × fullSelect × isExist matrix.

modifiers.name: icon
modifiers.doc: A leading SF Symbol before the title.

modifiers.name: rating
modifiers.doc: A leading star + numeric rating before the title.

modifiers.doc: Whether the represented item still exists; `false` strikes through and dims the chip (e.g.

modifiers.name: interactive
modifiers.doc: Whether the chip responds to taps (a read-only display chip passes `false`).

modifiers.name: expands

components.doc: A corner ribbon wrapping any content (Ant `Badge.Ribbon`).

components.name: DividerView
components.doc: A theme-driven divider: horizontal / vertical, solid / dashed, with an optional inline text label (left / center / right).

components.name: ProgressBar
components.doc: Linear determinate progress with status colors, an optional ladder gradient, a segmented (steps) variant and a custom format label.

modifiers.name: barHeight
modifiers.doc: Bar thickness in points (default 8).

modifiers.name: gradient
modifiers.doc: Fill with a status gradient instead of a solid color.

modifiers.name: steps
modifiers.doc: Render as a segmented (stepped) bar with this many segments.

modifiers.name: colors
modifiers.signature: colors(fill: Color? = nil, track: Color? = nil)
modifiers.doc: Overrides the fill color and/or the track color (otherwise status-derived).

modifiers.name: successSegment
modifiers.doc: A 0...1 portion drawn in the success color on top of the fill (Ant `success.percent`).

modifiers.name: valueFormat
modifiers.doc: Custom formatter for the percentage label (receives the 0...1 value).

modifiers.name: progressLabel
modifiers.doc: VoiceOver name for the bar (e.g.

components.name: Rating
components.doc: Star rating with two layouts (stars / numeric-leading), continuous fractional fill (display) or half-step interaction, a tappable review count, a custom character and a disabled state.

modifiers.name: maxValue
modifiers.doc: Number of glyphs / the score denominator (default 5).

modifiers.name: starSize
modifiers.doc: Glyph point size (default 16).

modifiers.name: allowHalf
modifiers.doc: Enables half-step interaction (and half-star tap targets).

modifiers.name: symbol
modifiers.doc: Overrides the SF Symbol used for the glyph (default "star").

modifiers.name: sentiment
modifiers.doc: Sentiment word for the `.rateNumberText` layout (otherwise score-derived).

modifiers.name: onRate
modifiers.doc: Makes the rating interactive: the closure receives the newly tapped value.

modifiers.name: onReviewTap
modifiers.doc: Makes the review count label a tappable link.

components.name: RemoteImage
components.doc: Async remote image on native `AsyncImage` (no Kingfisher dependency): URL + aspect ratio (number or "16:9" string) + shimmer placeholder + failure state.

components.name: RollingNumber
components.doc: Odometer / slot-machine number — each digit column rolls vertically to its new value when `value` changes (reference `RollingText`).

components.name: Skeleton
components.doc: A standalone skeleton block of an arbitrary shape and size.

modifiers.name: onSearch

components.name: VideoPlayerView
components.doc: Inline video on AVKit (reference `InlineVideoPlayerView`): autoplay, loop, mute, aspect-fill, and active-gating (only the visible item plays).

modifiers.name: autoplay
modifiers.doc: Whether the video starts playing on appear (default true).

modifiers.name: loop
modifiers.doc: Whether playback loops back to the start (default true).

modifiers.name: muted
modifiers.doc: Whether the audio starts muted (default true — required for iOS inline autoplay).

modifiers.name: muteToggle
modifiers.doc: Shows a mute/unmute toggle button overlay.

modifiers.name: tapToToggle
modifiers.doc: Whether tapping the video toggles play/pause.
